name: Pipeline Health
description: Health monitoring cho ETL pipeline OULAD — từ student_dwh.monitoring_log.

cards.text: Mỗi lần pipeline chạy, **18 health checks** ghi vào `monitoring_log` (row counts, NULL rate, accepted values). Dashboard này theo dõi reliability theo thời gian — nếu fail count tăng đột biến, có drift trong source data hoặc bug trong ETL.

cards.name: Total Checks Run
cards.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_checks FROM monitoring_log

cards.name: Failures Last 7 Days
cards.query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS recent_failures FROM monitoring_log
   WHERE status IN ('FAIL','ERROR') AND checked_at > NOW() - INTERVAL 7 DAY

cards.name: Status Distribution
cards.query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM monitoring_log GROUP BY status

cards.name: Latest 20 Health Checks
cards.query:
SELECT check_name AS `Tên check`, status AS Status, detail AS `Chi tiết`, checked_at AS `Thời điểm`
   FROM monitoring_log ORDER BY checked_at DESC LIMIT 20

cards.text:
### 💡 Hành động khi thấy bất thường

- **FAIL/ERROR > 0**: kiểm tra check name → drill xuống logs Airflow của DAG tương ứng.
- **WARN tăng đột biến** (ví dụ NULL rate score > 25%): có thể source data hỏng hoặc ETL skip rows. Kiểm tra MinIO Silver count vs DWH count.
- **Total Checks tăng nhưng Status không đa dạng**: pipeline đang chạy lặp nhưng có thể không có data mới — kiểm tra Airflow Datasets trigger.

cards.name: Health Status Over Time
cards.query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(checked_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') AS hour_bucket, status, COUNT(*) AS n
FROM monitoring_log
GROUP BY hour_bucket, status
ORDER BY hour_bucket

cards.name: Failure Leaderboard by Check
cards.query:
SELECT check_name AS `Tên check`,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('FAIL','ERROR') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count,
       SUM(CASE WHEN status='WARN' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS warn_count,
       COUNT(*) AS total_runs
FROM monitoring_log
GROUP BY check_name
ORDER BY fail_count DESC, total_runs DESC
